sglang.title: bugfix: add NPU to send_first check to prevent PP ring deadlock
sglang.author: xdtbynd
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

HCCL's HcclSend uses synchronous calling mode (blocks the stream until a matching HcclRecv is posted), unlike CUDA/NCCL where isend is asynchronous. The existing send_first parity check only covered XPU, leaving NPU ranks all sending first simultaneously, causing a circular wait deadlock

sglang.title: [Spec] Enable draft extend cuda graph for DeepSeek-V4 attention backend
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
DeepseekV4AttnBackend already implements the DRAFT_EXTEND graph bucket (capture + replay); register it in the EAGLE draft worker's supported list so draft extend runs under cuda graph instead of eager.
Verification: test_deepseek_v4_flash_fp8_h200.py (TP=4 + EAGLE) exercises this path -- graph captu

sglang.title: [NPU][bugfix] Fix NPU KernelLaunch Failure in rotate_input_ids_triton with Empty Batch

This PR fixes an NPU runtime crash introduced by PR #28492 (Refactor / simplify MultiLayerEagleDraftExtendCudaGraphRunner to use rotation).
When extend_seq_lens has a batch size of 0 (e.g., a DP rank with no active requests), rotate_input_ids_triton launches a triton kernel with an empty

sglang.title: ci: prune uv cache in job teardown to bound its growth
sglang.author: alisonshao
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
The persistent uv cache (~/.cache/uv, bind-mounted and shared across all runner containers) has no eviction, so it grows unbounded. On the 5090 hosts it reached ~500 GB and filled the root disk, failing jobs with ENOSPC at dependency install (failed to write to file ... os error 28).
Add a best-effo

sglang.title: [cuda-graph] Size breakable-graph shared buffer from warmup output; slice by produced row count
sglang.author: minosfuture
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
BreakableCudaGraphBackend.capture_one aliases the first capture's output tensor as the shared output buffer and slices every capture's output by the shape-key size. This assumes the graph body always produces exactly shape_key.size leading rows. A body that shards or prunes its output alo

sglang.title: Fix: add grammar sync in PP for structured output
sglang.author: starkwj
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Fix PP scheduler divergence when structured-output requests (requests using response_format) cause grammar-ready inconsistency across PP schedulers.
In PP mode, each worker has its own scheduler. Grammar compilation runs asynchronously on CPU, so the same request's grammar can become rea

sglang.title: [Fix] Guard kernel OOB accesses and harden runtime edge cases
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Small independent fixes, one commit each:

eplb: fall back to identity mapping when a layer id exceeds the physical expert map (draft workers can query more MoE layers than the target-sized map covers)
deepseek_v4 norm-rope kernel: skip rows with a negative out_loc sentinel instead of writing out of

sglang.title: [Spec] Extract shared draft worker construction and generalize draft sampler capture
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Behavior-preserving DFLASH refactor, one logical change per commit:

rename DFlashVerifyInput.num_tokens_per_batch to num_tokens_per_req, matching the field name the attention backends and EagleVerifyInput already use
require a CUDA device for DFLASH at argument resolution instead of failing mid-sta

sglang.title: [Fix] Unify ForwardBatch extend lens cpu fields to their declared list type
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: The three extend lens cpu fields are declared Optional[List[int]], and the *_cpu family convention is: tensor mirrors (seq_lens_cpu) stay tensors, host bookkeeping lists (encoder_lens_cpu, global_num_tokens_cpu, extend_*_cpu) stay lists. Two producers violated this and stored CPU tensors instead (th

sglang.title: bench: support random image resolutions
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

add random:<min_h>x<min_w>-<max_h>x<max_w> to the image benchmark dataset
sample one independent resolution per image from inclusive bounds, while preserving the benchmark seed for reproducibility
support vllm-chat image requests, so the same OpenAI Chat multimodal trace can be sent to SGLa

sglang.title: Lazy load TileLang MHC kernels
sglang.author: mmangkad
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This keeps TileLang out of the DeepSeek V4 import path until we actually need it. Model-registry discovery imports a lot of model files, so it should not also load TileLang's native CUDA stubs just because one unrelated module was discovered.
deepseek_v4_rope.py only uses Triton kernels, so

sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

add tuned Triton MoE configurations for Qwen3-VL and Kimi-VL on H100, plus Qwen3-VL on H200
reuse a tuned up-projection configuration when a separate down-projection configuration is unavailable
add Kimi-VL architecture recognition to the MoE tuning helper and configurable tuner batch sizes

add a CPU regression test for both the generic FA3 path and Kimi MoonViT forwarding

vllm.title: fix(entrypoints): stop resolve_items leaking in-flight media fetch tasks on partial failure
vllm.author: ErenAta16
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
AsyncMultiModalItemTracker.resolve_items fans out each modality's media fetches with plain asyncio.gather. When one fetch in a modality fails (bad URL, timeout, an SSRF/domain-allowlist rejection, a decode error), gather propagates that exception immediately, but it does not cancel or await

vllm.author: ibondarenko1
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
What this PR does
Fixes SSRF + arbitrary local file read in MiMoV2OmniMultiModalProcessor by routing caller-supplied media strings through MediaConnector instead of raw requests.get / Image.open calls.

Fixes bug 1 from #47650: _get_lora_device doesn't recognize the ark_linear base-layer shape produced by INCARKLinearMethod (INC WNA16 / AutoRound scheme), so --enable-lora crashes at model load with ValueError: Unsupported base layer for any AutoRound/INC ark-backed checkpoint.

Purpose
Support CPU backend for multimodal embedding reduction. Fixes two critical issues:

pin_memory incompatibility on CPU devices
Local function serialization failure in cross-process RPC

Enables Qwen2-VL and Qwen2.5-VL multimodal inference on CPU-only vLLM deployments.

vllm.title: [Frontend] Add /abort_requests to the RLHF dev API router
vllm.author: aoshen02
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Add POST /abort_requests to the RLHF dev API router
(vllm/entrypoints/serve/dev/rlhf/api_router.py). It calls
EngineClient.abort(request_ids) — removing queued requests from the waiting
queue and finish-aborting running ones — without pausing the scheduler.
When request_ids is empty/missing,
